false_positive_risks: _beforeTokenTransfer whitelist check gap is related to role-state consistency, but the final report classified it as low absent a stronger value-loss path
the public Silo/Cantina report treated this as Low/Informational because the scenario depended on economically unlikely 1 wei collateral representing meaningful value and no working PoC was produced
dual whitelist/blacklist role assignment is an admin hygiene issue unless it creates a demonstrated value-moving bypass

raw_triage.broken_invariant: vault valuation must remain correct under the root cause: missing validation or protection in Missing enough exogenous collateral check in VaultManagerV2::liquidate makes the liquidation revert even if (DYAD Minted > Non Kerosene Value), leaving the affected path without the required safety check

the public Silo/Cantina report treated this as Low/Informational because the scenario depended on economically unlikely 1 wei collateral representing meaningful value and no working PoC was produced

raw_triage.issue_text: K2 kinetic-router swap_collateral sets the to_asset collateral bit unconditionally after minting swapped collateral and only disables from_asset when new_user_scaled_balance == 0. Unlike supply/borrow/liquidation/aToken transfer finalize paths, it does not check count_active_reserves() against MAX_USER_RESERVES before adding a new destination reserve. Need determine whether partial swaps let a user exceed the 15 active-reserve cap, and whether impact is only self-account fragmentation/known dust-slot family or a distinct protocol-level DoS/accounting issue.
raw_triage.likely_root_cause: missing validation or protection in Missing enough exogenous collateral check in VaultManagerV2::liquidate makes the liquidation revert even if (DYAD Minted > Non Kerosene Value), leaving the affected path without the required safety check

minimum_assertions: 当前代码路径可由有效攻击者或普通用户触发
关键状态变量或资产余额出现可观测错误变化
影响不是仅由 trusted-role misconfiguration、用户误操作或 unsupported token 触发
若作为 HM，PoC 或状态推演能支撑 C4 severity
